page: Microsoft Azure E96s_v7 is an Esv7-family virtual machine configured with 96 dedicated vCPUs and 768.0 GB of system memory. Powered by an Intel x86_64 processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance provides a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying instead on external storage options.

The instance is Premium Storage capable, allowing users to attach high-performance external disk volumes to meet specific input/output requirements. Because there is no bundled local storage or complimentary public IPv4 addresses, network and storage architectures must be configured externally.

With its high memory density of 8.0 GB per vCPU, the E96s_v7 is designed for memory-intensive workloads. It is structurally suited for large-scale relational databases, in-memory caching systems, and enterprise applications that require substantial memory capacity relative to compute resources. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance for sustained enterprise workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure E96s_v7 is an Esv7-family virtual machine featuring 96 dedicated vCPUs and 768.0 GB of system memory, delivering a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. Built on the x86_64 architecture with Intel processors and managed by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance is designed for memory-intensive enterprise applications. The server does not include local storage or integrated GPUs but is Premium Storage capable, allowing high-performance external storage attachments. With its dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density, the E96s_v7 is optimized for workloads such as large-scale relational databases, in-memory data stores, and heavy enterprise resource planning systems.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E96s_v7 is an Esv7-family virtual machine featuring 96 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 768.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring ninety-six dedicated cores and substantial memory capacity for demanding enterprise database workloads.
